themes.reasoning_notes: Cheap artifact creature that slots naturally into artifact-synergy shells and leaves value behind.
Can cash itself in for a card, and unearth lets it provide that draw effect from the graveyard once more.
Has an intrinsic sacrifice outlet on itself, though only for its own body and mainly as value conversion.
One-mana artifact creature that cleanly supports artifact-count and artifact-recursion shells by existing as a cheap artifact body.
Its main gameplay value is converting itself into a card, and unearth lets it generate that redraw from the graveyard one additional time.
